workData.title: Measuremint
workData.description: AI-powered talent intelligence platform. Voice-first career agent for high-volume markets—10-min AI interviews via ElevenLabs + Claude, PostgreSQL + pgvector for semantic matching. Three-tier funnel (CV parsing → async voice challenge → full AI interview) cuts per-candidate cost from $5 to $0.15—a 95% reduction at scale.

workData.title: Global AI Safety Fellowship
workData.description: Large-scale, data-driven fellowship to source and identify top AI engineers and researchers for frontier AI safety labs including Anthropic, FAR.AI, and UK AISI. Screened 50,000+ candidates; enabled 45+ hires and 5 funded research PhD placements.

workData.title: ML Research Talent Map
workData.description: Built a 50,000-profile ML research talent map from 5 years of ICLR/ICML/CVPR proceedings. Implemented two-stage candidate matching with vector embeddings for <100ms semantic search across 500K+ profiles.

workData.title: Talent Index & JD Fingerprinting
workData.description: AHP-weighted Talent Index scoring framework and JD fingerprinting tool analyzing 106 job descriptions across 10 skill dimensions for AI labs including Anthropic, UK AISI, and Goodfire. Helps organizations identify gaps between their hiring signals and available talent.

workData.title: India AI Report
workData.description: India is emerging as a major supplier of AI talent globally. We built a dedicated tracker covering governance discussions, stakeholder decisions, investment trends, and technological developments across the Indian AI ecosystem.

workData.title: Recruiting Data Infrastructure
workData.description: Scalable recruiting infrastructure built on Cloud SQL → BigQuery → Elasticsearch with LinkedIn Recruiter RSC integration. Harvested 100+ data sources (conferences, Olympiads, GitHub, Codeforces) via Python scrapers, producing an 80K-record dataset at >90% field-level accuracy.
